\section*{Profile}
\begin{itemize}
    \item Master of Philosophy graduate from UWA with thesis on deep learning for medical screening, supported by 2 first-author IEEE conference publications
    \item Master of Information Technology (Artificial Intelligence) from University of Melbourne, WAM 81.1 (H1 / High Distinction average)
    \item 3.5 years' commercial front-end development experience building responsive cross-browser interfaces in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and jQuery
    \item Proficient in Python, Java, C, and SQL with hands-on experience deploying deep learning pipelines using PyTorch, scikit-learn, and OpenCV
    \item Effective written and verbal communicator with experience presenting technical research at international IEEE conferences in the USA and New Zealand
\end{itemize}

\section*{Publications}
\begin{itemize}
    \item M. Chowdhury, M. Bennamoun, F. Boussaid, S. M. Shamsul Islam, ``Classifying Obstructive Sleep Apnea from 3D Facial Images Using Automated Landmark Detection and Geodesic Distances,'' \textit{2025 IEEE Conference on Future Machine Learning and Data Science (FMLDS)}, Los Angeles, 2025, pp. 602--607. \href{https://doi.org/10.1109/FMLDS67896.2025.00098}{doi: 10.1109/FMLDS67896.2025.00098}

\section*{Professional Experience}
\noindent\textbf{Research Student (MPhil)} \hfill Sep 2023 -- Mar 2026 \\
\textit{University of Western Australia, Perth}

\begin{itemize}
    \item Designed and implemented an end-to-end deep learning pipeline in Python (PyTorch) for screening obstructive sleep apnea from 3D facial scans
    \item Engineered software for automated 3D facial landmark detection, replacing manual annotation and improving reproducibility
    \item Built reproducible Linux-based workflows on GPU hardware, integrating Open3D, trimesh, MeshLab, and CloudCompare for 3D mesh processing
    \item Tracked code in Git and authored 2 first-author IEEE conference papers from the resulting research
\end{itemize}
\vspace{4pt}
\noindent\textbf{Research Student (Master's Thesis)} \hfill 2022 \\
\textit{University of Melbourne, Melbourne}

\begin{itemize}
    \item Built an NLP pipeline in Python to predict relevant programming context from Stack Overflow answers using transformer models (Hugging Face) and NLTK
    \item Scraped and processed large volumes of developer Q\&A data using Beautiful Soup and ChromeDriver
    \item Reported findings in a thesis contributing to a final WAM of 81.1
\end{itemize}
\vspace{4pt}
\noindent\textbf{Front-End Web Developer} \hfill Apr 2016 -- Dec 2019 \\
\textit{Revo Interactive Ltd, Dhaka, Bangladesh}

\begin{itemize}
    \item Converted design wireframes into responsive production user interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and jQuery
    \item Ensured cross-browser consistency across Chrome and Firefox
    \item Integrated SEO content into HTML markup to improve search visibility for client websites
    \item Diagnosed and resolved bugs across the front-end codebase, reducing time-to-fix on reported issues
    \item Contributed design and development ideas during sprint planning, helping shape feature direction across the team
\end{itemize}

    \item \textbf{Web automation:} Beautiful Soup, Selenium / ChromeDriver, Playwright
    \item \textbf{Tools \& Methods:} Git, GitHub, Linux, LaTeX, Agile, Waterfall
\end{itemize}
